name: Mocha Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line ladyfingers around side of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Mix softened ice creams together.
3. Add coffee granules, liqueur and crushed toffee bars.
4. Pour into springform pan.
5. Spread a thin layer of chocolate sauce on top.
6. Freeze.
7. Before serving, spread cake with whipped cream.
8. Do not let this cake defrost before serving.
9. Serve immediately upon removing from freezer.
